title: botrychium lunaria subsp. minganense
intro: Botrychium lunaria subsp. minganense, also known as the Mingan moonwort, is a subspecies of the moonwort fern native to the Mingan Islands in Quebec, Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and treating various skin conditions, as well as acting as a diuretic and expectorant. The herbal preparations of Botrychium lunaria subsp. minganense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin irritations.
